situation: audit-2026-07-04-002 finding MM-M001 (priority 5, route-fix): strategy.rs L61-68 list_definitions uses .lock().unwrap() on std::sync::Mutex. If any holder panics while holding the lock, the mutex becomes poisoned and every subsequent .lock().unwrap() call also panics, causing cascade failure across all StrategyRegistry callers.
action: Replaced .lock().unwrap() with .lock().unwrap_or_else(|poisoned| { eprintln!(...); poisoned.into_inner() }) to recover inner data and log warning instead of propagating panic. Single-file fix in moni-rs/crates/moni-strategy/src/strategy.rs. Committed to existing opt-moni-strategy-1782942749 worktree (route-fix reuse, no public interface touched). Pushed to origin.
outcome_evidence: commit 985aad9 in auto/opt-moni-strategy-1782942749; git push confirmed new branch on origin; diff: +10/-6 lines in strategy.rs replacing unwrap with unwrap_or_else recovery pattern
next_suggestion: 派生 MM-M003 (sessions.rs SessionStore Mutex poisoning, same pattern) 或 MM-M004 (memory.rs RwLock poisoning)。两者都是 route-fix 可独立提交。
